'''Napdu''' was the fourth [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Da Soocha]]. [[Azzim Anjiliac Atirue]] had a high-end spa called [[Maya Armus]] there.

{{Moon-stub}}
